name: logistics managers processing 10–20 freight invoices/month tool
description: For logistics managers processing 10–20 freight invoices/month, inconsistent payment tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide weekly payment status summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent payment tracking leads to cash flow gaps.
